Looking at the full chart showing Supreme Court approval/disapproval polling from roughly 2021-2024:

1. At the very beginning of the chart (far left), the green Approve line starts above the pink Disapprove line — first period where disapproval < approval.

2. Around mid-2022 to early 2023, the lines converge closely and there appear to be brief crossings where the Approve line dips above the Disapprove line — creating 2 more separate periods where disapproval is lower.

2. Around mid-2022 to early 2023, the lines converge closely and there appear to be brief crossings where the Approve line dips above the Disapprove line — creating 2 more separate periods where disapproval is lower.

After these crossings, the Disapprove line rises clearly and consistently above the Approve line (ending at ~53.8% Disapprove vs ~36.6% Approve).
